hero.tagline: Luxury, technology and power in one intelligent SUV.

overview.minides: Bold, feature-packed, and impossible to ignore — the XUV 7XO brings flagship luxury to everyday driving.
overview.description: The Mahindra XUV 7XO is the facelifted XUV700 featuring a triple 12.3-inch coast-to-coast screen, Harman Kardon 16-speaker Dolby Atmos audio, Level-2 ADAS tuned for India, 540-degree surround camera, and ChatGPT + Alexa integration. Available in 27 variants with petrol and diesel engines, manual and automatic gearboxes, and AWD on select diesel trims.
